en: An activity or business operation must be reported to the Directorate of Internal Revenue no later than 8 days before the commencement of operations with registration in the register of employers and, as applicable, in the VAT register.
Please provide your Employer's Register number issued from the Iceland Revenue and Customs agency.
Companies can apply for an official employer’s registration certificate by submitting form RSK 14.10 – Application for a certificate to Skatturinn
Please provide your Employer's Register confirmation certificate issued from the Iceland Revenue and Customs agency .
